prompt: The button click handler does not update the UI correctly. What is the bug?
choices: Swing components must only be accessed on the Event Dispatch Thread; calling label.setText() from a background thread causes race conditions and visual corruption
addActionListener must be called after setVisible(true)
JButton and JLabel cannot both be added to the same JFrame
explanation: Swing is single-threaded — all UI updates must happen on the Event Dispatch Thread (EDT). Calling label.setText() from a background Thread causes undefined behavior, visual glitches, or exceptions. Fix: wrap the update in SwingUtilities.invokeLater(() -> label.setText("background"));
